---
title: "Task guides"
description: "Goal-oriented recipes. Each is standalone and links into the reference."
order: 0
---

Pick a task. Each guide is tagged by the package it belongs to.

| Guide | Package | What it covers |
|---|---|---|
| Ingest 10x Genomics data | [`openpipeline`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline}<span class="swatch openpipeline"></span> | FASTQ or raw counts → MuData with Cell Ranger |
| Ingest Xenium / Visium | [`openpipeline_spatial`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline_spatial} | Space Ranger mapping and spatial ingestion |
| Process & filter samples | [`openpipeline`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline} | Cell filtering, doublets, normalization, HVG |
| Process many samples (`param_list`) | [`openpipeline`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline} | Per-sample arguments plus shared settings in one run |
| Integrate with Harmony or scVI | [`openpipeline`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline} | Batch-correct and cluster across samples |
| Annotate cell types | [`openpipeline`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline} | CellTypist, scANVI, KNN label transfer |
| Generate a QC report | [`openpipeline_qc`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline_qc} | Standalone quality-control report |
| Speed up with GPUs | [`openpipeline_rapids`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline_rapids} | Swap in rapids-singlecell components |
| Find spatial niches | [`openpipeline_spatial`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline_spatial} | NicheCompass niche identification |
| Run a turnkey pipeline | [`openpipeline_composed`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline_composed} | End-to-end composed workflow |
| Tune compute resources | [`openpipeline`]{.pkg-tag .pkg-openpipeline} | Nextflow labels for CPU, memory, disk |

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Placeholder index — each row will become its own how-to page. The package tags
use the real package names, matching the reference facets.
:::
